Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPALL1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Allergy Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;VA POINT OF SERVICE (KIOSKS);**19**;Oct 21, 2011;Build 64 ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; EN1^GMRADPT 2421,10099 ; EN1^GMRAOR2 2422 ; ^GMRA(120.82 2380 ; ALL^PSN5067 4829 ; C^PSN50P65 4543 ; $$TGTOG^PSNAPIS 2574 ; $$TGTOG2^PSNAPIS 2574 ; Q ; RDALRG(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N DFN,ICN,PATIENTI,SDATE,EDATE,DVPCNT,FOUND S DFN="",FOUND=0 N X F X="allergyIntoleranceId","SDATE","EDATE" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) I ALLERGYI="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter allergyIntoleranceId is required.","RDALRG^DVPALL1") I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(ALLERGYI,"RDALG^DVPALL1") G QUIT I $P(ALLERGYI,":",5)="",+$P(ALLERGYI,":",6)=0 D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied allergyIntoleranceId: "_ALLERGYI_" has an invalid format.","RDALRG^DVPALL1") S ICN=$P(ALLERGYI,":",5) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"RDALRG^DVPALL1")=0 G QUIT ; ; Default to last 130 days I SDATE']"" S SDATE=$$FMADD^XLFDT(DT,-5000) I EDATE']"" S EDATE=DT ; Get Allergy Data N GMRAL,ID D EN1^GMRADPT ; assesment I 'GMRAL S @TARGET@("results","assessment")=$S(GMRAL=0:"nka",1:"not done") ; patient S @TARGET@("results","patient","DFN")=DFN S @TARGET@("results","patient","ICN")=ICN S (ID,DVPCNT)=0 F S ID=+$O(GMRAL(ID)) Q:ID<1 D . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1 . I ID=$P(ALLERGYI,":",6) S FOUND=1 D GMRA1(ID,DVPCNT,0) I 'FOUND D . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","not-found","MSG_NO_MATCH","No allergyIntolerance found for allergyIntoleranceId: "_$P(ALLERGYI,":",6),"RDALRG^DVPALL1") . K @TARGET@("results","patient") QUIT ; Q ; GMRA1(ID,DVPCNT,SMRY) ; -- allergy/reaction GMRAL(ID) N GMRA,DVPY,REAC,X,Y,I,ALGID,VERSTS S GMRA=$G(GMRAL(ID)) D EN1^GMRAOR2(ID,"DVPY") S ALGID=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("allergy",ICN,ID) ;asserted date S X=$P(DVPY,U,10) I $L(X) S X=$$DATE^DVPXUTL(X) I 'SMRY S REAC("assertedDate")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL(X) ;id S REAC("allergyIntoleranceId")=ALGID,REAC("localId")=ID S X="usual^^http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien^"_ALGID N IDENT D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.IDENT,X) M REAC("identifier")=IDENT ; patient N PAT D FHIRPAT^DVPXUTL(.PAT,ICN) M REAC("patient")=PAT ; ;coding S (REAC("code","coding","display"),REAC("code","text"))=$P(DVPY,U) I $P(GMRA,U,9) D . S X=$P(GMRA,U,9) ;,REAC("reference")=X . S Y=+$P(X,"(",2) I 'Y,X["PSDRUG" S Y=50 . N CODE S I=$$VUID^DVPXUTL(+X,Y),CODE="" I I]"" S CODE=$P($$SETVURN^DVPXUTL("vuid",I),":",4) . I CODE'="" S REAC("code","coding","code")=CODE ; ;historycal observed I 'SMRY S REAC("historical")=$S($E($P(DVPY,U,5))="H":"true",1:"false") I 'SMRY S REAC("observed")=$S($E($P(DVPY,U,5))="O":"true",1:"false") ; ;category N CATSTR,CATITM,CAT S CATSTR=$P(DVPY,U,7) S CATITM=1 F CATITM=1:1:100 S CAT=$P(CATSTR,",",CATITM) Q:CAT="" D . S CAT=$$LOW^XLFSTR($$TRIM^XLFSTR(CAT)) S:CAT="drug" CAT="medication" . S REAC("category",CATITM)=CAT ; ;type S REAC("type")=$S($P(GMRAL(ID),U,5)=0:"allergy",1:"intolerance") ; ;clinical status S REAC("clinicalStatus")="active" ; ; reactions I 'SMRY N I,Y S I=0 F S I=$O(GMRAL(ID,"S",I)) Q:I<1 D . S X=$G(GMRAL(ID,"S",I)) . S REAC("reaction",1,"manifestation",I,"text")=$P(X,";") . S Y=$$VUID^DVPXUTL(+$P(X,";",2),120.83) . I $P($$SETVURN^DVPXUTL("vuid",Y),":",4)'="" S REAC("reaction",1,"manifestation",I,"code")=$P($$SETVURN^DVPXUTL("vuid",Y),":",4) ; ;site for remote allergy N RMSITE S RMSITE=$G(GMRAL(ID,"SITE")) S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I 'SMRY S REAC("medicalCenter","siteId")=$P($S(RMSITE'="":RMSITE,RMSITE="":DVPSITE),U) I 'SMRY S REAC("medicalCenter","name")=$P($S(RMSITE'="":RMSITE,RMSITE="":DVPSITE),U,2) ; ;comments I 'SMRY N I S I=0 F S I=$O(DVPY("C",I)) Q:I="" D . S X=$G(DVPY("C",I)) Q:X="" . I $$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U))'="" S REAC("note",I,"date")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U)) ;ien^name^date^type^text . I $P(X,U,3)'="" S REAC("note",I,"author","authorString")=$P(X,U,3) . I $E($P(X,U,2))'="" S REAC("note",I,"author","authorType")=$E($P(X,U,2)) . N J,STR S J=0,STR="" F S J=$O(DVPY("C",I,J)) Q:J<1 D . . S STR=STR_DVPY("C",I,J,0) . I STR'="" S REAC("note",I,"text")=STR ; ; lastOccurrence I 'SMRY N I,SEVERITY S I=0 S I=$O(DVPY("O",I,-1)) I +I>0 D . S X=$G(DVPY("O",I)) . I $P(X,U)'="" S REAC("lastOccurrence")=$$FMTE^XLFDT($P(X,U)) I 'SMRY N I S I=0 F S I=$O(DVPY("O",I)) Q:I<1 D . S X=$G(VPSY("O",I)) Q:X="" . I $P(X,U)'="" S REAC("observedDateTimes",I,"dateTime")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(X,U)) . ; criticality . S:$P(X,U,2)]"" $P(SEVERITY(X),U,2)="" S:$G(SEVERITY("MILD")) SEVERITY="mild" S:$G(SEVERITY("MODERATE")) SEVERITY="low" S:$G(SEVERITY("SEVERE")) SEVERITY="high" S:$G(SEVERITY)="" SEVERITY="unable-to-assess" S REAC("criticality")=SEVERITY ; ;verified I $P(DVPY,U,4)="VERIFIED" D . S VERSTS="confirmed" . I $P(DVPY,U,9) S REAC("verifiedDateTime")=$$FHIRDTTM^DVPXUTL($P(DVPY,U,9)) I $P(DVPY,U,4)'="VERIFIED" D . N RES D DETAIL^ORQQAL(.RES,DFN,ID,ID) ; RETURN DETAILED ALLERGY INFO FOR SPECIFIED ALLERGIC REACTION: . S VERSTS=$S(GMRA'="":"unconfirmed","":"entered in-error") S REAC("verificationStatus")=VERSTS ; ;recorder N REC S REC=$G(^GMR(120.8,ID,0)),REC=$P(REC,U,5) I 'SMRY,REC'="" D . N PRC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PRC,REC) M REAC("recorder")=PRC ; ;asserter N REC S REC=$G(^GMR(120.8,ID,0)),REC=$P(REC,U,18) I REC'="" D . N PRC D FHIRPRC^DVPXUTL(.PRC,REC) M REAC("asserter")=PRC ; M @TARGET@("results","allergies",DVPCNT,"allergy_intolerance")=REAC Q ; GETSYMP(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Get the Signs and Symptoms for adding allergies N RES,NAME,X N I,IEN,X,NAME,SUB,FROM S I=0,FROM="" K ^TMP($J,"SIGNS") M ^TMP($J,"SIGNS","B")=^GMRD(120.83,"B") S SYN="" F S SYN=$O(^GMRD(120.83,"D",SYN)) Q:SYN="" F S SUB=0 F S SUB=$O(^GMRD(120.83,"D",SYN,SUB)) Q:'+SUB D ;233 .S NAME=$P(^GMRD(120.83,SUB,0),U) S ^TMP($J,"SIGNS","B",(SYN_" "_"<"_NAME_">"_U_NAME),SUB)="" ;233 F S FROM=$O(^TMP($J,"SIGNS","B",FROM)) Q:FROM="" D . I FROM="OTHER REACTION" Q ;Don't send this entry . S IEN=0 F S IEN=$O(^TMP($J,"SIGNS","B",FROM,IEN)) Q:'IEN D . . I $L($T(SCREEN^XTID)) I $$SCREEN^XTID(120.83,.01,IEN_",") Q ;Is term active . . S I=I+1 . . S @TARGET@("results","signsSymptoms",I)=IEN_U_FROM Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; FILENAME ; Display text of filenames for search treeview ;;120.82 ;;50.6 ;;50.605 ;;50.67 ;; ABJPHB(X) ; Search records from GMR ALLERGIES file for X input N DVPIEN,XB,XD I X="OTHER ALLERGY/ADVERSE REACTION" Q ;Don't send this entry ; Loop through allergy names S XB=X F S XB=$O(^GMRD(120.82,"B",XB)) Q:XB="" Q:$E(XB,1,$L(X))'=X D . I XB="OTHER ALLERGY/ADVERSE REACTION" Q ;don't send this entry . S DVPIEN=$O(^GMRD(120.82,"B",XB,0)) . I '$$SCR(120.82,DVPIEN) D SETRES($P($G(^GMRD(120.82,+DVPIEN,0)),U,1)_U_U_DVPIEN_";GMRD(120.82,") ; Set just the name ; Exact match on allergy synonym S XD=X F S XD=$O(^GMRD(120.82,"D",XD)) Q:XD="" Q:$E(XD,1,$L(X))'=X D . I XD="OTHER ALLERGY/ADVERSE REACTION" Q ;don't send this entry . S DVPIEN=$O(^GMRD(120.82,"D",XD,0)) . I '$$SCR(120.82,DVPIEN) D SETRES($P($G(^GMRD(120.82,+DVPIEN,0)),U,1)_U_XD_U_DVPIEN_";GMRD(120.82,") ; Set with synonym Q ; EJPF(X) ; Search records from VA GENERIC file for X input N DVPIEN,LIST,VAL,NAME S VAL=$$TGTOG2^PSNAPIS(X,.LIST) I $D(LIST) S DVPIEN=0 F S DVPIEN=$O(LIST(DVPIEN)) Q:'DVPIEN D . S NAME=$P(LIST(DVPIEN),U,2) . Q:$E($P(LIST(DVPIEN),U,2),1,$L(X))'=X . I '$$SCR(50.6,DVPIEN) D SETRES(NAME_U_U_DVPIEN_";PSNDF(50.6,") Q ; EJPFG(X) ; Search records from NDC/UPN file for X input N DVPIEN,LIST,NAME,I D TRDNAME(X,.LIST) I $D(LIST) S I=0 F S I=$O(LIST(I)) Q:'I D . S NAME=$P(LIST(I),U,2),DVPIEN=$P(LIST(I),U) . Q:$E($P(LIST(I),U,2),1,$L(X))'=X . I '$$SCR(50.67,DVPIEN) D SETRES($P(LIST(I),U,2)_U_U_DVPIEN_";PSNDF(50.67,") Q ; EJPFJE(X) ; Search records from VA DRUG CLASS file for X input N DVPIEN,LIST,NAME,I D CLASRCH(X,.LIST) I $D(LIST) S I=0 F S I=$O(LIST(I)) Q:'I D . S NAME=$P(LIST(I),U,2),DVPIEN=$P(LIST(I),U) . Q:$E($P(LIST(I),U,2),1,$L(X))'=X . I '$$SCR(50.605,DVPIEN) D SETRES($P(LIST(I),U,2)_U_U_50.605_U_DVPIEN) K ^TMP($J,"DVPAL1") Q ; SCR(FILE,IEN) ; Screen a term if not active N DVPCACHE K DVPCACHE Q:'$L($T(SCREEN^XTID)) 0 Q $$SCREEN^XTID(FILE,.01,IEN_",","",.DVPCACHE) ; SETRES(VALUE) ; Sets the results value with the next counter S CNT=CNT+1,@TARGET@("results","allergens",CNT)=VALUE Q ; CLASRCH(NAME,LIST) ; K ^TMP($J,"DVPAL1") D C^PSN50P65(,NAME,"DVPAL1") I $D(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1","C")) D . N I S I="" F S I=$O(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1","C",I)) Q:I="" D .. N J S J=0 F S J=$O(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1","C",I,J)) Q:'J S LIST(J)=J_U_$G(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1",J,1)) K ^TMP($J,"DVPAL1") Q TRDNAME(NAME,LIST) ; K ^TMP($J,"DVPAL1") D ALL^PSN5067(,NAME,,"DVPAL1") I $D(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1","B")) D . N I S I="" F S I=$O(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1","B",I)) Q:I="" D .. N J,K S J=$O(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1","B",I,0)) Q:'J S K=$$TGTOG^PSNAPIS(I),LIST(J)=K_U_$G(^TMP($J,"DVPAL1",J,4)) K ^TMP($J,"DVPAL1") Q
